title: [codereview-pass1] Test does not verify router.lookup_route behavior explicitly
description: The new yggdrasil_remote_address_not_local_mesh test relies on implicit default router state returning None. Add explicit mock or check to make test more robust. This is a P2 correctness issue from codereview. Fix before closing bead project-LICHEN-zt3c.5. Tag: codereview
